key_insights: OpenClaw delayed injection is unsolved (competitors only do point-in-time detection)
CIEU audit standard more valuable than detection algorithm (be the syslog of AI security)
Market crowded but NOT saturated (differentiation via compliance + memory attacks)
Iron Rule 1 compliance (no LLM) is FEATURE not bug (deterministic security)
self_critique: Strong competitive analysis and market validation. CIEU differentiation strategy is Board-aligned. OpenClaw gap research confirms unsolved problem. Minor gap: did not quantify false positive rates for rule-based detection (need to test in MVP).
